title: A Majority of Voters Support an A-F Grading Scale for Missouri Schools
description:
The Missouri House just approved a bill (H.B. 2710) that would require the 
Missouri Department of Elementary and Secondary Education (DESE) to publish 
an annual report card that assigns a letter grade (A-F) to schools across 
the state. This would replace the already existing Annual Performance 
Report that DESE currently publishes.

title: Which schools in Missouri are the best?
description:
The fifth edition of PRiME’s annual growth reports are live!  The “best” 
schools are usually thought to be those with the highest scores or 
proficiency rates on standardized tests. But that’s not necessarily the 
most effective way to evaluate school performance.  In these reports, 
schools are ranked according to the progress students made from one school 
year to the next.

title: New report confirms homeschooling popularity is surging
description:
A new report estimates that more than 3.4 million children in America are 
homeschooled – signaling yet again that the post-COVID homeschool surge is 
here to stay.

title: Five things to Know About MAP Testing
description: A quick FAQ for understanding the basics of MAP testing
